sections.sectionTitle: Paul leh Barnabas in Ikonium khua-ah Thu Hilh

verses.text: Ikonium khua a tun' uh ciangin Paul leh Barnabas zong Jew mite kikhopna inn-ah pai uh a, amaute' thuhilhna hangin Jew mi leh Gentail mi tampi tak in Pasian thu um uh hi
Ahi zongin thu umlo Jew mite in Gentail mite holhthawh uh a, thu um mite a mudahsak uh hi

Tua lai-ah sawltakte sauveipi tam uh a, Topa Jesuh thu hangtakin a hilh uh hi. Ama dikna thu a hilhnate uh man hi, ci-in a lahna dingin Topa in amaute tungah lim leh na lamdang bawltheihna ding vangliatna a pia hi
Tua khuasunga om mite pawl nih pha uh a, pawlkhat in Jew mite pan'pihin, pawlkhat in sawltakte a pan'pih uh hi
Gentail mi leh Jew mite in a uliante uh tawh kopin sawltakte bawlsia-in suang tawh den'ding a vaihawm uh hi
Sawltakte in tua thu a theih uh ciangin Likaonia gamsunga om Lystra khua, Derbe khua, leh tua gam kiima om khuate-ah tai uh a
tua a taina uh khuate-ah Lungdamna Thu a hilh uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Lystra khua-ah Suang tawh Paul Kideng

verses.text: A suahtunga kipanin lam a pai theilo khezaw mi khat Lystra khua-ah a om hi
Amah in Paul' thuhilhte limtakin a ngai hi. Tua mipa in damna a ngahzawhna ding zahin upna nei hi, ci-in Paul in a muh ciangin limtakin amah en a
“Na khe-in dingto in!” nakpi takin a ci hi. Tua mipa zong dingin lam pai kawikawi dingin a kipan hi
Mihonte in Paul' nasepna a muh uh ciangin amau' Likaonia pau tawh, “Mihing mel pua-in pasiante i kiangah hong pai hi,” ci-in a kiko uh hi
Barnabas pen Zeus ci-in min phuah uh a, Paul pen a thugenpi pen ahih manin Hermes ci-in min a phuah uh hi

Zeus pasian biakna inn tua Lystra khua nawlah a om hi. Tua Zeus pasian' na a sem siampipa in khuapi nawla a biakinn kongah bawngtalte leh pakkualte hong paipih hi. Amah leh mihonte in sawltakte a biakna dingun tua bawngte go-in pakkualte a pianuam uh hi
Ahi zongin Barnabas leh Paul in hih thu a zak uh ciangin mihonte' vaihawmna a nialna limun a puan uh balkekin mihon lakah tai-in kiko uh a

“Lawmte aw, bang hangin hih bangin gamta na hi uh hiam? Kote pen note mah bangin mihing ka hi lel uh hi. Bangmahin a kimanglo hih milimte na biakna uh panin kihei-in, vantung, leitung, tuipi leh tuate tung leh a sunga om khempeuh a bawl a nungta Pasian na biakna dingun Lungdamna Thu note kiangah a gen dingin hih lai-ah a hong om ka hi uh hi
A beisa hunsungah Pasian in mi khempeuh amau utbang ciatin hong gamtasak hi

Ahi zongin amah in a bangci Pasian hiam cih hong lahna-in mite-a' dingin na hoihnono a hong pia hi. Amah in van panin guah hong zusakin, a hun hunin anlak hunding hong tungsak hi. Amah in note' nekding an hong pia a, lungdamin a hong omsak hi,” a ci uh hi
Hih bangin thu a genna uh tawh mihonte in amaute a biaklohna dingun a khozo liailiai uh ahi hi

Ahi zongin Pisidia gama om Antiok khua leh Ikonium khua panin Jew mite hong pai uh a, mihonte hong holhthawh gawpin suang tawh Paul denggawp uh a, si khin hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh ahih manin khuanawlah a kaikhia uh hi
Ahi zongin thu um mite in amah umcihin a om laitakun amah hong tho-in khuasungah a lutkik hi. A zing ciangin Barnabas tawh Derbe khua-ah a pai uh hi
Paul leh Barnabas in Derbe khua-ah Lungdamna Thu hilh uh a, mi tampi in Pasian a um uh hi. Tua lai panin kileh kikin Lystra khua, Ikonium khua, leh Pisidia gama om Antiok khua-ah a pai uh hi
Thu um mite a upna uhah citakin a omna dingun hanthawnin tha pia uh a, “Pasian' Ukna sungah i omtheihna dingin haksatna tampi thuak ding hi hang,” ci-in a hilh uh hi
Khua pawlpi simah pawlpi upa ding sehsak uh a, an tangin thungetna tawh amaute' muan' ahi Topa' khutsungah tua mite a ap uh hi.
Pisidia gam a khen'khit uh ciangin Pamfilia gam a tung uh hi
Tua gamsunga om Perga khua-ah thu hilh uh a, tua khua panin Attalia khua-ah a paisuk uh hi
Attalia khua panin teembaw tuang uh a, tu-a a zawh uh nasep a kipatna dingun Pasian' khutsungah amaute a ki-apna Antiok khua a zuankik uh hi

Antiok khua a tun' uh ciangin amaute in pawlpi mite khawm uh a, a khualzinna uhah Pasian in na a seppihna khempeuh leh Gentail mite in zong thu a uptheihna dingun Pasian in lam a hon'saknate khempeuh a gen uh hi
Tua khua-ah thu um mite tawh sauveipi sung a omkhawm uh hi.
